summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Football Match Analyzer new gamification features. All backend APIs working perfectly (34/34 tests passed). Frontend mostly functional with excellent UI/UX for new features.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking match cards on /matches page doesn't navigate to individual match detail pages
integration_issues.impact: Cannot test BetSlip with boosts integration fully

passed_tests: All 34 backend API endpoints working perfectly
Pack opening system (Bronze/Silver/Gold packs with proper probabilities)
Avatar frames and player avatars system
Pack store UI with all 3 pack types displayed
Pack opening modal with animations and player reveals
Collection page with 5/40 players collected display
Dashboard with new stat cards (Credits: 620, Streak: 1d, Collection: 5/40)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix match detail page routing - clicking match cards should navigate to individual match pages (e.g., /matches/match_id) to enable BetSlip testing. All other features working excellently.
